summary: Run large-scale Beta balance and anti-snowball validation
acceptance_criteria: Run deterministic large-scale Beta scenario/seed batches with recorded artifact schema, hashes, sample sizes, snowball metrics, collapse metrics, and anti-stall metrics.
Identify runaway expansion, unavoidable collapse, no-action-heavy AI, exploit loops, and direct-control dominance with replay pointers and reason-code evidence.
Only explicit tuning or defect follow-ups may be recommended after content lock; no hidden manager, AI privilege, random nondeterminism, telemetry, server, or new major system is introduced.
Player and AI remain on the same command surface, and all balance evidence is local, reviewable, and not remotely collected.
Validation covers the M7 content set and carries forward M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS limits rather than treating Alpha balance as final proof.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-LARGE-SCALE-BALANCE-ANTI-SNOWBALL-001
notes: M6_GATE remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS and must not be rewritten as unconditional PASS or release readiness.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; this task must not create implementation, M7/M8 blocking spike, research, validation, or exit-gate dependency for manual node battle.
Player and AI behavior must continue through the same GameCommand/query/save surfaces where implementation work is later authorized.
sim-core must remain decoupled from React, Pixi, Electron, DOM, Node IO, real time APIs, hidden RPC, and object-graph serialization.
Stop and route to the named reviewer or Human Gate if allowed paths are insufficient, required tests cannot run, or a Human Gate decision is needed.
human_gates: manual playthrough acceptance where human judgment is required
commercial, release, store, branding, logo, or trademark decisions
telemetry, analytics, remote collection, accounts, paid services, or secrets
arbitrary-code mods, runtime scripting extensions, or Workshop support
cloud-save implementation, network persistence, or any account-backed save service
frozen product, platform, core architecture, technology stack, simulation authority, deterministic, or historical-policy changes
manual node battle reversal or any formal 1.0 scope reversal
scheduling_reason: Selected as the highest-priority dependency-ready M7 task after M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 closed; UI/localization/art directive has already been incorporated through closed M7 visual and UI-localization planning tasks.
next_action: Await balance_analyst writer REVIEW handoff, validate it, then route to gameplay_designer for independent review.
